raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The proposed budget includes an initial, one-time funding of $110 million towards Proposition 36.",
    "The initial plan misses the mark relative to the measure’s core component: ensuring accountability to complete court-mandated treatment.",
    "Without frontline supports, there is no accountability in the supervision of court-ordered treatment.",
    "Budget cuts to county probation departments threaten public safety by reducing the capacity to hold individuals accountable.",
    "Treatment without accountability does not align with the principles of Proposition 36.",
    "The current funding level for probation departments is inadequate to manage the required supervision of individuals in treatment programs.",
    "The budget cuts will lead to less compliance with rehabilitation programs, which threatens public safety."
  ]
}
```
